name: hj_status
description: 本仓 hj-gateway + 6 仓外部 clone 状态总览
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$lines=@(); $lines+='== hj-gateway =='; $lines+=(Get-ChildItem e:\HJ\cursor\subprojects\hj-gateway -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count.ToString()+' files'; $lines+='== 6 外部仓 =='; Get-ChildItem e:\HJ\cursor\subprojects\repos-from-external -Recurse -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $d=$_.FullName; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $d '.git')) { $n=Split-Path $d -Leaf; $lines+=$n+' (git)'; } }; $lines -join [Environment]::NewLine"
